jobs.title: Senior Customer Success Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Senior Customer Success Manager</strong></p><p>Postscript is the Shopify-native SMS-marketing platform pioneered around the e-commerce-conversational-SMS data model & the Shopify-SMS-marketing segment.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Backend Engineer
jobs.content: <p>Lead Postscript's Backend Engineering function across the Subscriber Acquisition Tools / Campaigns / Sales Associates / Shop platform.</p>
